xray.group.CfnAbout: Use the `AWS::XRay::Group` resource to specify a group with a name and a filter expression. Groups enable the collection of traces that match the filter expression, can be used to filter service graphs and traces, and to supply Amazon CloudWatch metrics.

xray.group.FilterExpression.Description: The filter expression defining the parameters to include traces.

xray.group.GroupName.Description: The unique case-sensitive name of the group.

xray.group.InsightsConfiguration.Description: The structure containing configurations related to insights.  + The InsightsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights for the group or false to disable insights for the group.+ The NotificationsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights notifications through Amazon EventBridge for the group.

xray.group.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.
